instruction: Five icons in a row (check, x-mark, plus, minus, eye). Recolor ONLY the last one (eye) red (#e63946); the others stay #222.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 336 80" width="336" height="80">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="336" height="80" fill="white" />
  <g id="check" data-source="heroicons/outline/check.svg" transform="translate(16, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m4.5 12.75 6 6 9-13.5"/></g>
  <g id="x-mark" data-source="heroicons/outline/x-mark.svg" transform="translate(80, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 18 18 6M6 6l12 12"/></g>
  <g id="plus" data-source="heroicons/outline/plus.svg" transform="translate(144, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 4.5v15m7.5-7.5h-15"/></g>
  <g id="minus" data-source="heroicons/outline/minus.svg" transform="translate(208, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M5 12h14"/></g>
  <g id="eye" data-source="heroicons/outline/eye.svg" transform="translate(272, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M2.036 12.322a1.012 1.012 0 0 1 0-.639C3.423 7.51 7.36 4.5 12 4.5c4.638 0 8.573 3.007 9.963 7.178.07.207.07.431 0 .639C20.577 16.49 16.64 19.5 12 19.5c-4.638 0-8.573-3.007-9.963-7.178Z"/>
  <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 12a3 3 0 1 1-6 0 3 3 0 0 1 6 0Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
